title: 30 Días: Cambia de hábitos, cambia de vida
author: Greg S. Reid
customHTML:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1600 2400" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%">
  <!-- A 6x5 calendar grid (30 cells). 29 are ash; the 30th is RED — the day that changed everything. -->
  <g transform="translate(800 1500)" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" text-anchor="middle">
    <!-- 6 cols x 5 rows of 140x140 boxes, with 20px gap. Total width 6*140 + 5*20 = 940. -->
    <g stroke-width="1">
      <!-- Row 1 -->
      <g transform="translate(-470 -360)">
        <rect x="0" y="0" width="140" height="140" fill="none" stroke="#4c4c4c"/>
        <text x="70" y="80" font-size="36" font-weight="300" fill="#cccccc">1</text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(-310 -360)">
        <rect x="0" y="0" width="140" height="140" fill="none" stroke="#4c4c4c"/>
        <text x="70" y="80" font-size="36" font-weight="300" fill="#cccccc">2</text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(-150 -360)">
        <rect x="0" y="0" width="140" height="140" fill="none" stroke="#4c4c4c"/>
        <text x="70" y="80" font-size="36" font-weight="300" fill="#cccccc">3</text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(10 -360)">
        <rect x="0" y="0" width="140" height="140" fill="none" stroke="#4c4c4c"/>
        <text x="70" y="80" font-size="36" font-weight="300" fill="#cccccc">4</text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(170 -360)">
        <rect x="0" y="0" width="140" height="140" fill="none" stroke="#4c4c4c"/>
        <text x="70" y="80" font-size="36" font-weight="300" fill="#cccccc">5</text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(330 -360)">
        <rect x="0" y="0" width="140" height="140" fill="none" stroke="#4c4c4c"/>
        <text x="70" y="80" font-size="36" font-weight="300" fill="#cccccc">6</text>
      </g>
      <!-- Row 2 (7-12) -->
      <g transform="translate(-470 -200)"><rect x="0" y="0" width="140" height="140" fill="none" stroke="#4c4c4c"/><text x="70" y="80" font-size="36" font-weight="300" fill="#cccccc">7</text></g>
      <g transform="translate(-310 -200)"><rect x="0" y="0" width="140" height="140" fill="none" stroke="#4c4c4c"/><text x="70" y="80" font-size="36" font-weight="300" fill="#cccccc">8</text></g>
      <g transform="translate(-150 -200)"><rect x="0" y="0" width="140" height="140" fill="none" stroke="#4c4c4c"/><text x="70" y="80" font-size="36" font-weight="300" fill="#cccccc">9</text></g>
      <g transform="translate(10 -200)"><rect x="0" y="0" width="140" height="140" fill="none" stroke="#4c4c4c"/><text x="70" y="80" font-size="36" font-weight="300" fill="#cccccc">10</text></g>
      <g transform="translate(170 -200)"><rect x="0" y="0" width="140" height="140" fill="none" stroke="#4c4c4c"/><text x="70" y="80" font-size="36" font-weight="300" fill="#cccccc">11</text></g>
      <g transform="translate(330 -200)"><rect x="0" y="0" width="140" height="140" fill="none" stroke="#4c4c4c"/><text x="70" y="80" font-size="36" font-weight="300" fill="#cccccc">12</text></g>
      <!-- Row 3 (13-18) -->
      <g transform="translate(-470 -40)"><rect x="0" y="0" width="140" height="140" fill="none" stroke="#4c4c4c"/><text x="70" y="80" font-size="36" font-weight="300" fill="#cccccc">13</text></g>
      <g transform="translate(-310 -40)"><rect x="0" y="0" width="140" height="140" fill="none" stroke="#4c4c4c"/><text x="70" y="80" font-size="36" font-weight="300" fill="#cccccc">14</text></g>
      <g transform="translate(-150 -40)"><rect x="0" y="0" width="140" height="140" fill="none" stroke="#4c4c4c"/><text x="70" y="80" font-size="36" font-weight="300" fill="#cccccc">15</text></g>
      <g transform="translate(10 -40)"><rect x="0" y="0" width="140" height="140" fill="none" stroke="#4c4c4c"/><text x="70" y="80" font-size="36" font-weight="300" fill="#cccccc">16</text></g>
      <g transform="translate(170 -40)"><rect x="0" y="0" width="140" height="140" fill="none" stroke="#4c4c4c"/><text x="70" y="80" font-size="36" font-weight="300" fill="#cccccc">17</text></g>
      <g transform="translate(330 -40)"><rect x="0" y="0" width="140" height="140" fill="none" stroke="#4c4c4c"/><text x="70" y="80" font-size="36" font-weight="300" fill="#cccccc">18</text></g>
      <!-- Row 4 (19-24) -->
      <g transform="translate(-470 120)"><rect x="0" y="0" width="140" height="140" fill="none" stroke="#4c4c4c"/><text x="70" y="80" font-size="36" font-weight="300" fill="#cccccc">19</text></g>
      <g transform="translate(-310 120)"><rect x="0" y="0" width="140" height="140" fill="none" stroke="#4c4c4c"/><text x="70" y="80" font-size="36" font-weight="300" fill="#cccccc">20</text></g>
      <g transform="translate(-150 120)"><rect x="0" y="0" width="140" height="140" fill="none" stroke="#4c4c4c"/><text x="70" y="80" font-size="36" font-weight="300" fill="#cccccc">21</text></g>
      <g transform="translate(10 120)"><rect x="0" y="0" width="140" height="140" fill="none" stroke="#4c4c4c"/><text x="70" y="80" font-size="36" font-weight="300" fill="#cccccc">22</text></g>
      <g transform="translate(170 120)"><rect x="0" y="0" width="140" height="140" fill="none" stroke="#4c4c4c"/><text x="70" y="80" font-size="36" font-weight="300" fill="#cccccc">23</text></g>
      <g transform="translate(330 120)"><rect x="0" y="0" width="140" height="140" fill="none" stroke="#4c4c4c"/><text x="70" y="80" font-size="36" font-weight="300" fill="#cccccc">24</text></g>
      <!-- Row 5 (25-29) -->
      <g transform="translate(-470 280)"><rect x="0" y="0" width="140" height="140" fill="none" stroke="#4c4c4c"/><text x="70" y="80" font-size="36" font-weight="300" fill="#cccccc">25</text></g>
      <g transform="translate(-310 280)"><rect x="0" y="0" width="140" height="140" fill="none" stroke="#4c4c4c"/><text x="70" y="80" font-size="36" font-weight="300" fill="#cccccc">26</text></g>
      <g transform="translate(-150 280)"><rect x="0" y="0" width="140" height="140" fill="none" stroke="#4c4c4c"/><text x="70" y="80" font-size="36" font-weight="300" fill="#cccccc">27</text></g>
      <g transform="translate(10 280)"><rect x="0" y="0" width="140" height="140" fill="none" stroke="#4c4c4c"/><text x="70" y="80" font-size="36" font-weight="300" fill="#cccccc">28</text></g>
      <g transform="translate(170 280)"><rect x="0" y="0" width="140" height="140" fill="none" stroke="#4c4c4c"/><text x="70" y="80" font-size="36" font-weight="300" fill="#cccccc">29</text></g>
      <!-- Day 30: RED — the breakthrough day -->
      <g transform="translate(330 280)">
        <rect x="0" y="0" width="140" height="140" fill="#fc1c46"/>
        <text x="70" y="80" font-size="36" font-weight="300" fill="#ffffff">30</text>
        <text x="70" y="115" font-size="11" font-weight="500" fill="#ffffff" letter-spacing="0.18em">HÁBITO</text>
      </g>
    </g>
  </g>
</svg>
rationale: A 30-day calendar grid: 29 ash cells, the 30th in RED — the day the new habit sticks. 220px weight-500 title at the top. Spanish edition marked by pill '30 D'.
